title: The One Prode Stage
body:
The mod will allow you to restricted the mod display of [The One Prode](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-one-probe) on the GUI

To add restrictions, you have to use [CraftTweaker](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafttweaker). There are one script methods available.

**mods.topstages.TOPStages.setStage(String stage)** - *Replace the stage string with the name of the stage. This will then make it so players require that stage to view the The One Prode HUD*
